namespace.name: ConformanceEcs
namespace.description: Minimal API surface used by the fastify build-conformance suite. Locked — do not couple to lending or any other canonical example. The single endpoint exists to exercise the api-cell ↔ output-openapi flip: its request body declares an `object` Field with nested fields, which the runtime spec at /api-json must render with type:object + properties (not flatten to a string). See `flip-api-cell-to-output-openapi`.

endpoints.description: Convert a payload from one shape to another. Carries object Fields in the request body to gate the api-cell ↔ output-openapi rendering chain.
